case_title: FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC. VS. BORIS BONDAREMKO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $180.25 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BONDAREMKO, BORIS IND DBA WINDOW CITY & CONSTRUCTION ORESHKIN, SERGEY IND DBA WINDOW CITY & CONSTRUCTION
DECLARATION OF GARY E. LOONEY RE: LOST ORIGINAL CONTRACT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC. DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS")

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUND RECOVERY SERVICES, INC. DBA ACCOUNTS RECEIVABLE MANAGEMENT SOLUTIONS ("ARMS") RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONDAREMKO, BORIS IND DBA WINDOW CITY & CONSTRUCTION ORESHKIN, SERGEY IND DBA WINDOW CITY & CONSTRUCTION $1,459.30 PRINCIPAL, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $218.30 INTEREST, $180.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,257.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-13-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
